access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities.
access_attempts.notes: Extraction uses abstract-level results for this baseline pass.

name: A phase 3 randomized placebo-controlled trial of tadalafil for Duchenne muscular dystrophy.
summary: Phase 3 randomized placebo-controlled trial in 331 glucocorticoid-treated boys with Duchenne muscular dystrophy, testing tadalafil 0.3 or 0.6 mg/kg/day versus placebo for 48 weeks on 6-minute walk distance and secondary ambulatory function outcomes.
